mapper.select: SELECT asset_type assetType, (SELECT d.`value` FROM t_sys_dict d WHERE d.type = 'asset_type' AND d.`code` = asset_type LIMIT 1) assetTypeName, sum(amount) amount, sum(invest_amount) investAmount, count(*) assetCount FROM t_asset_ledger WHERE asset_owner = #{assetOwner} GROUP BY asset_type ORDER BY asset_type

SELECT asset_sub_type assetSubType, (SELECT d.`value` FROM t_sys_dict d WHERE d.type = 'asset_type_3' AND d.`code` = asset_sub_type LIMIT 1) assetSubTypeName, sum(amount) amount, sum(invest_amount) investAmount, count(*) assetCount, sum(CASE WHEN asset_status = 4 THEN amount ELSE 0 END) clearedAmount, sum(CASE WHEN asset_status = 4 THEN invest_amount ELSE 0 END) clearedInvestAmount, sum(CASE WHEN asset_status = 4 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) clearedCount, sum(CASE WHEN asset_status != 4 THEN amount ELSE 0 END) activeAmount, sum(CASE WHEN asset_status != 4 THEN invest_amount ELSE 0 END) activeInvestAmount, sum(CASE WHEN asset_status != 4 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) activeCount FROM t_asset_ledger WHERE asset_owner = #{assetOwner} AND asset_type = 3 GROUP BY asset_sub_type ORDER BY asset_sub_type

SELECT asset_sub_type assetSubType, (SELECT d.`value` FROM t_sys_dict d WHERE d.type = 'asset_type_4' AND d.`code` = asset_sub_type LIMIT 1) assetSubTypeName, sum(amount) amount, sum(invest_amount) investAmount, count(*) assetCount, sum(CASE WHEN asset_status = 4 THEN amount ELSE 0 END) clearedAmount, sum(CASE WHEN asset_status = 4 THEN invest_amount ELSE 0 END) clearedInvestAmount, sum(CASE WHEN asset_status = 4 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) clearedCount, sum(CASE WHEN asset_status != 4 THEN amount ELSE 0 END) activeAmount, sum(CASE WHEN asset_status != 4 THEN invest_amount ELSE 0 END) activeInvestAmount, sum(CASE WHEN asset_status != 4 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) activeCount FROM t_asset_ledger WHERE asset_owner = #{assetOwner} AND asset_type = 4 GROUP BY asset_sub_type ORDER BY asset_sub_type

SELECT (SELECT d.`value` FROM t_sys_dict d WHERE d.type = 'asset_type' AND d.`code` = asset_type LIMIT 1) TEXT, sum(amount) VALUE FROM t_asset_ledger WHERE asset_owner = #{assetOwner} GROUP BY asset_type
SELECT asset_name text, (amount - IFNULL(invest_amount, 0)) value FROM t_asset_ledger WHERE asset_owner = #{assetOwner} AND asset_status = 4 ORDER BY (amount - IFNULL(invest_amount, 0)) DESC
